descriptionShort: Centennial Cup round-robin game box score between Humboldt and Richmond on May 7, 1987.
descriptionLong: Box score and game summary from Centennial Cup round-robin play in Humboldt, Saskatchewan. Humboldt defeated Richmond 6–7 in a contest featuring multiple penalties and fights. The match included detailed scoring summaries by period, penalty information, and shot totals (Humboldt 37, Richmond 19). A semi-final matchup between Pembroke and Richmond was scheduled for that evening.
